content.text: Fix auth crash in src/auth/login.ts line 42 when token is missing.
I can fix that by guarding null tokens and adding a test.
Do it like last time, same approach we used for refresh token validation.
Understood. I will reuse the refresh-validation pattern and keep behavior consistent.
Option A+B please; keep strict governance and avoid risky assumptions.
I will combine A+B and prioritize explicit confirmations where confidence is low.
Also summarize expected ROI: latency, acceptance, and token efficiency.
I can include latency and token efficiency from process telemetry and track acceptance outcomes per request.
